lines.english: The Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਇਹੁ ਗੁਫਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad ihu gufaa veechaare |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, search this cave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai sabad suhaae mil preetam sukh paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and decorate yourself with the Shabad. Meeting with your Beloved, you shall find peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤ ਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਲੇਵੈ ਰਤੀਅਹੁ ਮਾਸਾ ਤੋਲ ਕਢਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gharree muhat kaa lekhaa levai rateeahu maasaa tol kadtaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They are called to account for each instant and each moment. Every grain, every particle, is weighed and counted. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਜਾਗਾਤੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਕਰੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jam jaagaatee doojai bhaae kar laae |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death imposes his tax on those who are attached to duality.
He inflicts punishment on those who forget the Name.
She shall weep bitterly in the end.
One who does not remember her Husband Lord in this world is being cheated by duality;

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰੀ ਕੁਆਲਿਓ ਕੁਰੂਪਿ ਕੁਲਖਣੀ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kharee kuaalio kuroop kulakhanee supanai pir nahee paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: She is from an evil family; she is ugly and vile. Even in her dreams, she does not meet her Husband Lord. ||6||
She who enshrines her Husband Lord in her mind in this world
His Presence is revealed to her by the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਸਬਦੇ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੈ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kaaman pir raakhiaa kantth laae sabade pir raavai sej suhaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: That soul-bride keeps her Husband Lord clasped tightly to her heart, and through the Word of the Shabad, she enjoys her Husband Lord upon His Beautiful Bed. ||7||
He enshrines His Name within our minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੮॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee anadin sadaa gun gaavaniaa |8|28|29|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who receives the greatness of the Naam night and day, constantly sings His Glorious Praises. ||8||28||29||
The Lord Himself sends out the call, and He summons us to His Presence.
Sublime is their birth, and the place where they dwell.
Those who serve the True Guru remain detached in the home of their own being.
Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har rang raheh sadaa rang raate har ras man tripataavaniaa |1|
lines.english: They abide in the Lord's Love, and constantly imbued with His Love, their minds are satisfied and fulfilled with the Lord's Essence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਪੜਿ ਬੁਝਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree parr bujh man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who read of the Lord, who understand and enshrine Him within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੜਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਹਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh parreh har naam salaaheh dar sachai sobhaa paavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs read and praise the Lord's Name; they are honored in the True Court. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kare taa satigur bhettai nadaree mel milaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: If the Lord grants His Grace, then we come to meet the True Guru. By His Kindness, we are united in His Union. ||2||
The Unseen and Inscrutable Lord is permeating and pervading everywhere.
He cannot be obtained by any effort.
One who reads, while attached to duality, does not understand.
He yearns for the three-phased Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tribidh bandhan tootteh gurasabadee gurasabadee mukat karaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The bonds of the three-phased Maya are broken by the Word of the Guru's Shabad. Through the Guru's Shabad, liberation is achieved. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਚੰਚਲੁ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man chanchal vas na aavai |
lines.english: This unstable mind cannot be held steady.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾ ਕੀੜਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਪਚਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bikh kaa keerraa bikh meh raataa bikh hee maeh pachaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: It is a poisonous worm, drenched with poison, and in poison it rots away. ||4||
Attached to duality, it wanders in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bahu karam karai kichh thaae na paae |
lines.english: They perform all sorts of rituals, but they gain no acceptance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰੇ ਤੈ ਆਪੁ ਜਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau kare tai aap janaae |
lines.english: Practicing egotism and selfishness, they try to impress others by showing off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਬਖਸੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tujh te baahar kichhoo na hovai bakhase sabad suhaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Without You, Lord, nothing happens at all. You forgive those who are adorned with the Word of Your Shabad. ||5||
They are born, and they die, but they do not understand the Lord.
Night and day, they wander, in love with duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਹੈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh janam geaa hai birathaa ant geaa pachhutaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The lives of the self-willed manmukhs are useless; in the end, they die, regretting and repenting. ||6||
The Husband is away, and the wife is getting dressed up.
This is what the blind, self-willed manmukhs are doing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਨ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਲਤਿ ਨ ਢੋਈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: halat na sobhaa palat na dtoee birathaa janam gavaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: They are not honored in this world, and they shall find no shelter in the world hereafter. They are wasting their lives in vain. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam kinai viralai jaataa |
lines.english: How rare are those who know the Name of the Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kare din raatee sahaje hee sukh paavaniaa |8|
lines.english: Night and day, they perform the Lord's devotional service; day and night, they find intuitive peace. ||8||
Through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru, the Lord is realized.
Only a few, as Gurmukh, understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੯॥੨੯॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate jan soheh kar kirapaa aap milaavaniaa |9|29|30|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam are beautiful. Granting His Grace, God unites them with Himself. ||9||29||30||
That One Lord is pervading in all.
